## Bug Description

<!-- A clear and concise description of what the bug is. -->

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

<!-- What should have happened? -->

## Actual Behavior

<!-- What actually happened? Include error messages if any. -->

## Screenshots / Recordings

<!-- If applicable, add screenshots or screen recordings. -->

## Environment

- **Browser**: <!-- e.g., Chrome 122, Safari 17 -->
- **Device**: <!-- e.g., MacBook Pro M3, iPhone 15, Samsung Galaxy S24 -->
- **OS**: <!-- e.g., macOS 14.3, iOS 17.3, Android 14 -->
- **Screen size**: <!-- e.g., Desktop 1440px, Mobile 375px -->
- **User role**: <!-- e.g., Buyer, Dealer, Admin -->
- **URL**: <!-- Page where the bug occurred -->

## Console Errors

<!-- Open browser DevTools (F12) > Console tab. Paste any errors here. -->

```
paste console errors here
```

## Additional Context

<!-- Any other context about the problem. Was this working before? Did it happen after a specific action? -->

## Severity

- [ ] Critical (platform unusable, data loss, payment failure)
- [ ] High (major feature broken, no workaround)
- [ ] Medium (feature partially broken, workaround exists)
- [ ] Low (cosmetic issue, minor inconvenience)
